# I AM THE CHANGE
## Scholarship Program — Home Visit Questionnaire
**Team Everest | Confidential**

**Volunteer Name:** M. Mohammed Riaz
**Co-Volunteer Name:** Hasini Mohan
**Date of Visit:** 04/07/2026

--- Page 1 ---

## Section 1 — Student Profile

### **1.1. Application ID**
Enter Application ID TEMP-2026-8911

### **1.2. Student Full Name**
Enter full name Keerthana G

### **1.3. Gender**
☐ Male☒ Female☐ Others

--- Page 1 ---

## Section 2 — Family Background

### **2.1. Family Status**
☐ Single Parent☐ Parentless☒ Having both parents

### **2.2. Relationship Details (if applicable)**
| Year of Death / Separation | Reason for Death / Separation |
|----------------------------|-------------------------------|
| — NA —                     |                               |
|                            |                               |

### **2.3. Is Father/ Mother photograph kept at home?**
☒ Yes ☐ No

### **2.4. Government ID Verified (Ration Card / Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Voter ID)**
☒ Aadhaar Card ☐ Ration Card ☐ Driving Licence ☐ Voter ID ☐ Other: 

### **2.5. Family Members**
| Name          | Age | Education            | Occupation    | Annual Income |
|---------------|-----|----------------------|---------------|---------------|
| V. Gurusdjan  | 44  | BCA                  | Delivery Agent| 1.80 Lakh     |
| R. Sridani    | 43  | 12 <sup>th</sup>    | Housewife     | —             |
|               |     |                      |               |               |
|               |     |                      |               |               |

--- Page 2 ---

## Section 3 — Housing Condition

### **3.1. House Ownership**
☐ Own ☒ Rented

#### **

--- Page 2 ---

3.1.1 If rented, what is the rent amount?**
Rent amount Rs. 10,500/-

### **3.2. Type of Home**
☐ Individual ☐ Private Apartment ☐ Housing Board ☒ Line House ☐ Others: 

## **3.3. Type of Ceiling**
- ☐ Roof (Kurai) ☐ Tiled ☐ Asbestos / Sheet ☒ Concrete

### **3.4. Number of Bedrooms**
Enter number 1

### **3.4.1 Type of Bedroom**
- ☒ Separate Bedroom ☐ No Separate Bedroom

### **3.5. Bathroom**
- ☒ Separate ☐ Common for Apartment

### **3.6. Kitchen Type**
- ☒ Separate Kitchen ☐ Hall with Kitchen

--- Page 3 ---

## **Section 4 — Financial Background**

### **4.1. Assets at Home (tick all that apply)**
- ☒ Washing Machine ☒ Fridge ☒ AC ☒ LED TV ☒ Two-Wheeler ☐ Car
- ☒ Smartphone ☒ Separate Wi-Fi ☐ Others: 

### **4.2. Amount of Last Electricity Bill**
Amount in ₹ Rs. 1200/- for 2 months

### **4.3. Do you own any other assets/properties in the name of grandparents, parents, or student?**
- ☐ Yes ☒ No

**4.3.1 If yes, list their properties:**
| Property Description | Owner Name | Approximate Value |
|----------------------|------------|-------------------|
| — NA —              |            |                   |
|                      |            |                   |
|                      |            |                   |

**4.4. Apart from your job, is there any other source of income?**
☐ Yes ☒ No

**4.4.1 If yes, list other sources of income:**
| Source of Income     | Amount     |
|----------------------|------------|
| — NA —              |            |
|                      |            |
|                      |            |

**4.5. Income Type**
☐ Monthly ☐ Daily ☐ Weekly ☒ Ad-Hoc

**4.6. Do you have any loans?**
☒ Yes ☐ No

**4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount:**
| Sr. No. | Loan Purpose                                          | Loan Amount Taken | Pending Loan Amount |
|---------|-------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|---------------------|
| 1.      | Private Borrowings                                     | 10 Lakh           | 10 Lakh             |
| 2.      | Credit Card App loans for student's grand mother medical treatment)| 8 Lakh            | 8 Lakh              |

--- Page 4 ---

**4.7. If you choose any college, how much is the college fee?**
Amount in ₹ Rs. 47600/- per semester

**4.8. If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it?**
Through savings & borrowings

**4.9. If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees?**
Same as above

--- Page 5 ---

# Section 5 — Health Information

**5.1. Does the student have any health issues?**
☐ Yes ☒ No

**5.2. If yes, list the health issues:**
Describe health issues - NA -

# Section 6 — Student Commitment

**6.1. Will you study college for three years without any obstacle?**
Yes

**6.2. If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come?**
☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Maybe

**6.3. Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)?**
☒ Yes ☐ No

--- Page 6 ---

# Section 7 — Scholarship Information

**7.1. Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree?**
NIL

# Section 8 — Volunteer Observation

**8.1. What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition?**
The student is highly dedicated, intelligent & motivated to achieve upward mobility through higher education. Her father is the only bread winner of the family. He works as a delivery agent, whose income is unstable and seasonal.

**8.2. Will you recommend this student for this scholarship?**
☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Not Sure

**8.3. Any other comments you want to share?**
Granting this scholarship will be a great assistance, easing their current hardship and empowering her to graduate.

Volunteer Signature *Musku*
Co-Volunteer Signature *Ha M*
